objective: Define and gate the adjusted/PIT forward-return label layer required before V3.49/V3.50 can perform real state-stratified signal validation.
forbidden: Do not compute forward returns from raw unadjusted close.
Do not create fake labels or placeholder returns.
Do not run signal validation, IC, hit rate, backtest, or model promotion.
acceptance: Required label sources must be explicit.
Current readiness must block performance validation when adjusted/PIT labels are missing.
Raw close substitution must be explicitly forbidden.
Manual data queue must identify what unblocks MARKET and stock-level labels.
The report must separate label-layer readiness from performance readiness.
